arts.ttl: Late Leeds United injury call, new Gnonto task and Firpo decision
arts.sum: If not for his injury, Farke might have been tempted to rotate and start Gruev against Norwich. Farke says he is “carefully optimistic” that his issue is nothing sinister but it might be that he is not played from the start with one eye on Monday’s trip to Burnley.

arts.ttl: Wednesday's Championship predictions including Leeds vs. Norwich
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Championship fixtures, including Leeds United vs. Norwich City.

arts.ttl: Leeds United squad revealed for Norwich City as Daniel Farke makes Manor Solomon decision
arts.sum: Daniel Farke is wary of the threat his former club Norwich City will pose tonight as Leeds United look to extend their unbeaten Championship run to 10 matches. A depleted Canaries team head to West Yorkshire aiming to get their play-off push back on track after losing to Sheffield United last time out.

arts.ttl: MATCHDAY LIVE: Norwich City U21s vs Hertha Berlin
arts.sum: Follow live updates from Norwich City under-21s’ meeting with Hertha Berlin in the Premier League International Cup.

arts.ttl: Update on Leeds United player’s foreign interest, contact made earlier in January
arts.sum: Leeds United midfielder Josuha Guilavogui has been subject to interest from Ligue 2 side Paris FC this month, but he is not expected to be heading out of Elland Road this month. Josuha Guilavogui was the man they turned to in response, penning a contract until the end of the season to add experience behind Joe Rothwell and Ao Tanaka, since then he’s not been called upon too often as Ampadu and now Gruev have returned to the side.

arts.ttl: Emi Buendia Leeds United transfer verdict after fresh twist
arts.sum: And Buendia, with his experience in the Championship and relationship with Farke, could bring something different and an extra ounce of quality to the Leeds set-up. The difference between finishing in the play-offs and the automatic promotion places could be that extra bit of quality in the squad, and that is something that Buendia would bring.

arts.ttl: Norwich City boss makes Leeds United admission but fires Daniel Farke warning
arts.sum: Norwich City manager Johannes Hoff Thorup has described his club’s trip to Leeds United on Wednesday as their “toughest test yet” but believes his players are capable of causing a shock. They lie just a point behind Sheffield Wednesday, whose manager Danny Rohl described United as the best team in the division following Sunday’s 3-0 defeat to the Whites .

arts.ttl: 'Like a dream' - Wilfried Gnonto sends message to Leeds United diehards after hitting big milestone - Leeds Live
arts.sum: Wilfried Gnonto says he “never dreamt” of reaching 100 appearances for Leeds United and has thanked fans for their support throughout his time at Elland Road. I don’t think there’s a winger or offensive player who has started more games than Willy Gnonto during the season, he has been involved in many starting line-ups.

arts.ttl: Leeds United transfer latest as defender joins Scottish club on trial ahead of potential exit
arts.sum: Leeds United are contemplating letting another young player leave on loan in the January transfer window. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community

arts.ttl: Leeds United defender goes on trial to UK club ahead of potential move
arts.sum: Leeds United’s U21 centre-back Kris Moore is claimed to have gone on trial for Scottish club St Johnstone this week ahead of a potential move. Scottish outlet The Courier has now revealed that U21 centre-back Kris Moore has travelled up to Scotland in order to begin a trial with St Johnstone.
